name_cn:
POCHETTE MÉTIS EAST WEST Handbag #️⃣M46279
Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same custom Italian production process as the authentic version, featuring dynamic chip re-coding, original factory materials, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches the authentic version)
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, and the latest official website gift box!
21.5 x 13.5 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
S-lock closure
Zippered front pocket
Internal pocket
Central zippered interior pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 29.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 45.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 19.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in Italy
